theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 53점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 41 / 중기 74 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Gold Falls for Third Day as US Launches Fresh Strikes on Iran
top_news.summary: Gold fell for a third day after the US launched fresh strikes against Iran, threatening to extend the war that’s roiled global markets and stoked inflation fears.

top_news.title: Oil Surges as Fresh US Strikes on Iran Threaten Fragile Truce
top_news.summary: Oil jumped after the US started new strikes on Iran, putting further strain on a fragile ceasefire and threatening to prolong the conflict in the Middle East that’s upended global markets.

top_news.title: Warsh May Tackle Inflation in New Way: Fmr. Fed Governor
top_news.summary: Former Federal Reserve Governor and former Wells Fargo chair Betsy Duke analyzed the recent inflation data, noting that headline and core inflation figures came in as expected but remain concerning for everyday consumers. She emphasized that while the Federal Reserve committee is unlikely to take immediate action at the next meeting, the persistent rise in living costs—especially energy prices—continues to outpace wage growth, creating financial strain for many households. She speaks

top_news.title: DIGITAL Ben Hylak
top_news.summary:
Ben Hylak, founder and CTO of AI monitor Raindrop, says that the ability for AI to fix its own mistakes is the last 'big problem to solve' for humanity and that his company's role is to help companies 'raise the floor' of how AI models work in their system. 
Hylak, a former SpaceX and Apple engineer, also commented on the upcoming IPO, saying that SpaceX is one of the most 'mission driven' companies he's been a part of.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Key Military Mineral Stores Depleted By Iran War Says US Mining Heads
top_news.summary: Paul Andre Huet, chairman & CEO of Americas Gold & Silver, and Gary Evans, CEO of US Antimony, discussed the impact of war with Iran on US critical minerals supplies and how the ramp up in tech IPOs has increased demand, even as metals prices have slumped in recent days. Huet, speaking on the rise of resources for artificial intelligence IPOs, said that silver is going to be the 'new power revolution.'  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Retired Gen. Kimmitt: Hormuz, Lebanon Are ‘Diversions'
top_news.summary: Oil prices increased by about 2% following escalated threats from the US President to 'hit Iran hard' after delays in peace negotiations. Retired US Army Brigadier General Mark Kimmit, Former Assistant Secretary of State for Political Military Affairs, joined the discussion to analyze the shift in US posture. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Chevron Among Drillers to Feed Argentina Shale NGL Venture
top_news.summary: Chevron Corp. and two other major Argentine shale producers will sign contracts this week to supply a natural gas liquids project, a move that all but assures the $3 billion plan goes ahead, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Stock Investors Eye Deep Run for Japan at Football World Cup
top_news.summary: Japan enters the 2026 football World Cup as Asia’s top-ranked team, fueling hopes that the Samurai Blue can finally reach the quarterfinals and lift shares of streaming, food and beverage companies along the way.

top_news.title: Tech Stocks Sink as Oil Jumps on US-Iran Jitters: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Wall Street was rattled by a renewed selloff in some of the world’s largest technology companies, with stocks also falling as a flare-up in geopolitical tensions lifted oil prices.

top_news.title: Oracle Earnings Report | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
